sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used to load DIT input order.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for 16-point IFFT positive-exponent factors.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with Q1.15 rounded twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational arithmetic right-shift output normalizer for final IFFT divide-by-16 scaling.
